wardImageAltText: Image of a Dota 2 observer ward

landing.heroDescription: Munaliiga is a friendly Dota 2 league for new and returning players.
landing.heroImageAlt: Munaliiga observer and sentry ward artwork
landing.aboutBody: We form balanced teams, assign each group an experienced coach and schedule proper league matches. The point is to learn the game with the same group instead of figuring everything out alone.
landing.joinBody: Fill in the signup form or drop by Discord. You can join on your own.
landing.liveBody: You can watch the games with casters live on Twitch!
